nasb.text: The burden of the word of the Lord is against the land of Hadrach, with Damascus as its resting place (for the eyes of men, especially of all the tribes of Israel, are toward the Lord),

esv.text: The oracle of the word of the Lord is against the land of Hadrach and Damascus is its resting place. For the Lord has an eye on mankind and on all the tribes of Israel,

cnv.text: 以下是耶和華的默示： 耶和華的話臨到哈得拉地，落在大馬士革，

ccb.text: 与以色列各支派一样， 世人的眼目都仰望耶和华。 以下是耶和华的启示： 祂的惩罚必临到哈得拉， 临到大马士革，
